event.summary: Prepared a source-first, planning-last push bundle without executing Git push.

acceptance.proof: One accepted LSLC-002A parse yields an existing StreamDefinition with empty desc metadata and existing StreamInfoVolatileFields, under caller-selected existing limits.
Only amp/lt/gt entities, seven observed channel-format names, decimal channel counts, and the six accepted LSLC-001L nominal-rate spellings admit; damaged fixtures reject deterministically.
Accepted state owns only the decoded typed observation; it carries no provider witness and asserts no acquisition, freshness, currentness, identity, endpoint semantics, or authorization.
Dependencies, unsafe, I/O, sockets, network, runtime, features, devices, and Manifold authority remain closed.

architecture_decision.deferred_reason: It starts a separate wire family while parsed documents still lack a typed consumer; it is the recommended next dependency after this closed admission path.
architecture_decision.material_advance: Closes the already accepted canonical document parser into the repository's existing typed StreamDefinition and volatile-field contracts, creating a usable source-only observation boundary for later discovery without adding runtime behavior.

document.commit_policy: Commit the bounded typed-observation admission separately from protocol-110 wire shapes, discovery, networking, runtime activation, owner evidence, and authority.

instruction_surfaces.change_reason: Route LSLC-002B typed observation admission and its non-current, non-wire boundary.
Describe the closed parser-to-existing-contract path and limits.
Review Rusty LSL routing and public/authority boundaries; no skill mutation expected.
Review artifact roles, closed activation, typed observation authority, damaged fixtures, and additive failure evidence.
instruction_surfaces.validation: Reviewed installed skill; typed admission remains source-only, inert, observer-only, and separate from wire, runtime, provider, and Manifold authority.

non_scope: Protocol-110 query or short-info wire shapes, datagrams, discovery, sockets, networking, endpoint interoperability, or runtime activation.
General XML parsing or entity decoding, noncanonical numeric forms, nonempty desc mapping, attributes, namespaces, DTD, CDATA, or round-trip claims.
Provider acquisition or witnesses, common epochs, freshness, currentness, endpoint semantics, reachability, identity generation, authorization, or activation.
Manifold admission, registry, subscription, route, lease, revision, replay, authorization, audit, session, topology, transport, command, product, or provider authority.
document.objective: Consume one accepted LSLC-002A canonical empty-description parse into existing bounded StreamDefinition and StreamInfoVolatileFields typed observation contracts by decoding only the three admitted character-data entity spellings and accepting only the already observed static numeric and channel-format spellings. Preserve source-only, inert, non-current observation semantics.
outputs: A bounded consuming typed observation admission over one accepted parsed document.
Exact entity decoding and closed static lexical admission into existing typed contracts.
An empty desc MetadataTree plus the eleven decoded opaque volatile values, without owner witnesses.
Public-safe accepted and damaged fixtures and focused validation.
